title: Meta Marketing API Ad Campaign
description: Represents an advertising campaign in the Meta Marketing API (Campaign level in the Campaign > Ad Set > Ad hierarchy). Includes budget, objective, status, and scheduling fields.

id.description: The unique identifier for the campaign.

account_id.description: The ID of the ad account that owns the campaign.

objective.description: The campaign objective defining the optimization goal. Uses the Outcome-Based Ads objectives introduced in Meta Marketing API v18+.

status.description: The campaign status set by the advertiser.

effective_status.description: The effective status of the campaign, accounting for parent ad account status and any issues.

configured_status.description: The configured status of the campaign as set in the API.

buying_type.description: The buying type for the campaign. AUCTION is the default for most campaigns.

bid_strategy.description: The bid strategy for the campaign.

budget_remaining.description: The remaining budget of the campaign in the account currency, expressed in cents.

daily_budget.description: The daily budget of the campaign in the account currency, expressed in cents.

lifetime_budget.description: The lifetime budget of the campaign in the account currency, expressed in cents.

spend_cap.description: The spend cap for the campaign in the account currency, expressed in cents.

special_ad_categories.description: Special ad categories the campaign falls under (e.g. credit, employment, housing, social issues).

start_time.description: The start time of the campaign, in ISO 8601 format.

stop_time.description: The stop/end time of the campaign, in ISO 8601 format.

created_time.description: The time the campaign was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_time.description: The time the campaign was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

source_campaign_id.description: The ID of the source campaign this was copied from, if applicable.

smart_promotion_type.description: The type of smart promotion applied to the campaign.

pacing_type.description: The pacing type for ad delivery.

promoted_object.description: The object being promoted (e.g. a pixel, app, or Page).

custom_event_type.description: The custom conversion event type (e.g. PURCHASE, LEAD, ADD_TO_CART).

adsets.description: The ad sets within this campaign.
